title: A Third Hand
body:
A Third Hand

Lazy Mod,Auto-Loot Treasures Chests.

[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1288509?logo=CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quickpickme) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/o2A6wa7q?logo=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/o2A6wa7q)
--- #### **🔹 Product Positioning** A Mod to Solve the "Tedious Item Sorting" Problem After Opening Treasure Chests #### **🔹 Core Features** - **Auto-Loot Treasure Chests**: When you open a treasure chest,mod will automatically identify and collect the items that are already in your inventory. #### **🔹 Keybind** - H: Quickly enable or disable mod. ### **🔹 Lisence** - Feel free to learn from it. - non-commercial use allowed.
